scripts.validate: bun run lint:fix && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.validate:ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run generate:check
scripts.generate: SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --features full,memory-backend -p yauth --test generate_client -- generate_openapi_spec --exact --nocapture --include-ignored && bunx orval
scripts.generate:check: SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --features full,memory-backend -p yauth --test generate_client -- check_openapi_spec_up_to_date --exact --nocapture && bunx orval && git diff --exit-code packages/client/src/generated.ts packages/client/src/generated.msw.ts
